articles.title: Holden rejects second MBTA Communities proposal, faces legal action
articles.description:
The zoning measure failed by a vote of 520 to 257.

The post Holden rejects second MBTA Communities proposal, faces legal action appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Holden rejected the MBTA Communities zoning proposal in a 520 to 257 vote.
This marks the second rejection of the proposal by Holden officials.
Legal action may ensue, affecting future housing developments in the area.

articles.title: Civil rights group wants AG to address LGBTQ-related bullying in school hockey
articles.description:
“We are concerned that this rise is a backlash to the growing visibility and popularity of the television series Heated Rivalry,” Lawyers for Civil Rights said. 

The post Civil rights group wants AG to address LGBTQ-related bullying in school hockey appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lawyers for Civil Rights urge AG to tackle LGBTQ bullying in school hockey.
Concerns arise over increased bullying linked to the series 'Heated Rivalry.'
Local schools may face pressure to improve anti-bullying policies for LGBTQ students.

articles.title: Al Horford supports Luke Kornet’s stance on Hawks’ ‘Magic City’ promotion
articles.description:
"Well said Luke," Horford posted on X.

The post Al Horford supports Luke Kornet’s stance on Hawks’ ‘Magic City’ promotion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Al Horford publicly supports Luke Kornet's comments on the Hawks' promotion on X.
Kornet criticized the Atlanta Hawks' 'Magic City' promotion, gaining attention from Celtics fans.
This support highlights the Celtics' unity and may influence local fan perceptions.
